description: Create a professional film lighting plot for 'Scene 54: The Interrogation' using Diagrams.net (draw.io) based on the Director of Photography's notes in ~/Desktop/dp_scene_notes.txt. The diagram must include room boundaries (20' x 15') with the specified door and window, shapes for the 'Detective' and 'Suspect' actors, and a legend defining symbols for Fresnel, Leko, LED Panel, and Actor. Place and label the 5 specific lighting fixtures (L1-L5) with their ID, Wattage/Type, and Gel color as described in the notes. Include lines representing power cables connecting all lights to a Distro Box. Save the editable file to ~/Diagrams/lighting_plot_scene54.drawio and export a PDF version to ~/Diagrams/lighting_plot_scene54.pdf.
